title: spiraea palustris
intro: Spiraea palustris, also known as marsh spirea, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is native to wetlands in North America. The medicinal properties of Spiraea palustris include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, soothe sore throats, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Spiraea palustris can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
